name: Emiliano Yahel Ruiz Oropeza
role: Junior Full-Stack Developer | React / Backend / Databases
summary: Junior Full-Stack Developer with experience building dashboards, backend services, database artifacts and API integrations using React/Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, SQL, MongoDB, Supabase, Docker, GraphQL, WebSockets and third-party services such as Facturama, Mercado Pago, Google APIs and AWS S3/Storage. Focused on practical problem-solving, clean UI implementation, data consistency, financial/operational workflows and collaboration through GitHub workflows, testing and stakeholder communication.

experience.title: Fullstack Developer
highlights: Built and maintained Invoices and Wallet dashboards using Next.js/React with TypeScript aligned with operational and financial workflows.
Implemented backend services and internal APIs, including billing workflows and Facturama integrations.
Developed database artifacts including tables, views and stored procedures to support financial modules and improve data consistency.
Worked with SQL-based persistence, API integrations and AWS S3/Storage for file uploads and reads.
Used GitHub multi-branch workflows, testing practices and Docker-supported development workflows to reduce regressions.
Collaborated with operational and financial stakeholders to customize modules and translate business needs into technical deliverables.

experience.title: Full Stack Developer
highlights: Developed a platform for managing clients, schedules, routines, reminders, payments and account status.
Built a REST API with Node.js/Express and a SQL-backed database for CRUD operations and payment/session reminders.
Integrated Google APIs for email notifications and Mercado Pago for payment validation and debt/account status workflows.
Implemented administrative views to compare pending vs paid balances and support operational decision-making.

experience.title: Research Assistant / Backend Jr.
highlights: Co-authored a Springer publication on satellite imagery analysis.
Developed Python-based search algorithms and supported neural network work for satellite image analysis.
Modeled and implemented a database for laboratory inventory, warehouse control and lending control.
Supported backend logic for tracking instruments, materials and loan status.
